text: Hello! It's nice to have you. Please enjoy your stay here.
Let me give you some useful information about my creator 🙌
With more than 7 years in the development world Othon Parra, now working as a Front-end developer is someone definitely passionate about knowledge and creativity.
Some of the tools he uses on his daily work are pretty interesting.
ReactJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Material UI, Styled Components, React Query, Vite
In the future I want to be able to talk with you and solve all the questions you may have.
